title: rumohra assamica
intro: Rumohra assamica, also known as the Himalayan fern or the Himalayan maiden's hair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rumohra assamica include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Rumohra assamica is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, decoctions, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
